summary: Redesigned Onboarding Flow & App Directory - All features verified. Onboarding: 13 slides for salesperson role with welcome slide showing 3 benefits, 8 Quick Win slides (#1-#8) with yellow badges, interactive demos (DigitalCardDemo, CongratsCardDemo, BirthdayCardDemo, ReviewPageDemo, ShowroomDemo, QuickActionsDemo, CampaignsDemo), Try It Now buttons, AI setup slide, checklist slide with 6 actionable items, and complete slide with 'Let's Go!' button. App Directory: 88 total pages across 12 categories, with Public Customer Pages (8), Quick Win Tools (8), Analytics & Reporting (7) at top. Each page has Preview, Copy Link, Share buttons. Search filters pages correctly.

issues: Welcome title shows 'Welcome to [logo] !' instead of 'Welcome to Your New Sales Toolkit' - logo is embedded inline in title

critical_code_review_comments: slideLibraries.ts: Well-structured with 8 Quick Win slides for salesperson (QUICK_WIN_DIGITAL_CARD through QUICK_WIN_CAMPAIGNS)
slideLibraries.ts: SALESPERSON_SLIDES has 13 slides total: 2 welcome + 8 quick wins + 1 AI setup + 1 checklist + 1 complete
index.tsx: renderQuickWinBadge() creates yellow badge with flash icon and 'Quick Win #N' text
index.tsx: renderTryItButton() creates blue button with play-circle icon navigating to tryItRoute
index.tsx: renderChecklist() creates actionable list with icons, labels, descriptions, and chevron arrows
index.tsx: 7 demo components implemented: BirthdayCardDemo, ReviewPageDemo, ShowroomDemo, QuickActionsDemo (new) plus existing AI/Card demos
app-directory.tsx: PAGE_CATALOG has 12 categories starting with public_pages, quick_wins, analytics_reports
app-directory.tsx: Each PageEntry has Preview, Copy Link, Share action buttons with proper data-testids
app-directory.tsx: Search filters by name, description, path, and audience fields correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding flow tested with 13 slides navigated using Continue button. Quick Win slides have yellow badges, demo visualizations, benefits list, and blue Try It Now buttons. Checklist slide has 6 items for salesperson role. Complete slide has green 'Let's Go!' button. App Directory tested at /admin/app-directory with login (forest@imosapp.com / Admin123!). Categories expand/collapse on click. Search bar filters in real-time. Each page has 3 action buttons.
